patterns.name: Sustained Harmonic Resonance
patterns.description: The audio is overwhelmingly harmonic (Ratio 46.99). It exhibits long-form resonance with stable tonal centers.

patterns.name: Dominant Pitch Constellation
patterns.description: Strong energy concentration in G#, A#, D#. Fundamental frequencies are anchored around 409.1Hz and 419.9Hz.

patterns.name: Broadband Spectral Complexity
patterns.description: The sound contains significant noise or complex, dense frequency distributions (stochastic patterns).
